name: Jade Mountain
description: Jade Mountain, also known as Yushan (玉山), stands as a towering symbol of purity, strength, and divine connection within Chinese mythology and tradition. It is often considered one of the most sacred mountains in China, although its exact location is sometimes debated, reflecting its symbolic rather than strictly geographical importance. In many narratives, Jade Mountain is described as a dwelling place of immortals and deities, a realm where the veil between the mortal world and the celestial realm thins. Its jade-like appearance, whether literal or metaphorical, underscores its association with preciousness, longevity, and spiritual enlightenment. The mountain is frequently depicted as a source of vital energy (qi) and a conduit for communication between humans and the divine. Ascending Jade Mountain, either physically or spiritually, represents a journey of self-discovery and the pursuit of higher knowledge. It embodies the challenges and rewards of striving towards enlightenment and achieving a harmonious relationship with the natural world. Legends often speak of rare herbs and powerful artifacts found on its slopes, further emphasizing its mystical significance. Jade Mountain serves as a potent reminder of the enduring human quest for transcendence and the profound connection between the earthly and the celestial in Chinese cosmology. It represents the ultimate destination for those seeking wisdom, immortality, and a deeper understanding of the universe, a place where the boundaries between reality and myth blur into a harmonious whole. The mountain's enduring presence in folklore and literature underscores its vital role in shaping Chinese cultural identity and spiritual values. It is the embodiment of perseverance, spiritual aspiration, and the enduring power of nature.
subtitle: Purity, Strength, Divine Connection

keyMyths.title: Journey to Jade Mountain
keyMyths.description: A mortal embarks on a perilous journey to Jade Mountain, seeking wisdom from the immortals who reside there. They face numerous trials, ultimately proving their worthiness and receiving invaluable knowledge.

keyMyths.title: The Jade Flower of Immortality
keyMyths.description: Legend tells of a rare jade flower that blooms atop Jade Mountain, granting immortality to whoever consumes it. Many seek this flower, but only the pure of heart can find it.

sources.author: Werner, E.T.C.
sources.description: A comprehensive collection of Chinese myths and legends.
